notice: Today's brief is a short one. The usual edition could not be built, so here are the stories that ranked highest, with links to the sources. Full service resumes tomorrow.

stories.title: Regulators approve the first over-the-counter blood pressure implant
A major cloud outage knocked out banking and delivery apps
A common login tool had a flaw that let attackers skip passwords
A cheaper malaria vaccine begins its first wide rollout
Two big carmakers agree to share one charging plug
State law will make delivery apps show the full price up front
Airlines must issue cash refunds within a week of a canceled flight
New rule requires phone makers to sell repair parts
A central bank held interest rates steady for the third meeting
A large retailer will close 40 underperforming stores
